title: Asian tech stocks surge as U.S.-Iran cease fire ease Hormuz disruption worries
summary_full: Shares of Asian tech and semiconductor comoanies surged on the news that the U.S. and Iran agreed to a conditional two-week ceasefire.
summary_public: Shares of Asian tech and semiconductor comoanies surged on the news that the U.S. and Iran agreed to a conditional two-week ceasefire.
